summary: Tested blog feature implementation for Shubhankar Tiwari's portfolio. Blog listing and individual posts work correctly with proper markdown rendering and sorting. Critical navigation integration issues found.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation component missing on blog pages (/blog and /blog/[slug]) - no top navigation bar with theme toggle, recruiter mode, or nav links
Blog link in homepage navigation doesn't navigate to /blog - stays on homepage when clicked

integration_issues.issue: No theme toggle available on blog pages since Navigation component is missing
Cannot navigate from blog pages to homepage sections (About, Work, etc.) since nav links are missing

passed_tests: Blog listing at /blog shows 3 posts correctly
Posts sorted by date (newest first): Jan 20 2026, Dec 15 2025, Oct 8 2025
Blog post titles render correctly with data-testid='blog-post-title'
Blog post content renders with data-testid='blog-post-content'
Blog post tags display correctly (AI, LLM, NLP, Python, Backend, Production, etc.)
Blog post dates and read time display correctly
Markdown rendering works: headings (7 total), code blocks (1), bold text (3), lists (3)
Code blocks have proper dark styling with correct colors
Back to blog links work with data-testid='blog-back-link'
'All posts' links present at bottom of blog posts
Back to portfolio link works with data-testid='blog-home-link'
Homepage navigation includes Blog link with pen icon
Homepage theme toggle and recruiter mode still functional
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Blog pages are missing the Navigation component entirely. Need to add Navigation component to blog layout or create a shared layout that includes navigation for all pages. Also fix homepage Blog nav link navigation issue.
